temporal_description:
(00:00-00:02) A man in a white shirt and dark tie walks with a serious expression through a dimly lit, green-tinted office hallway. He glances back over his shoulder with a concerned look before continuing down the corridor. (Storyline: This opening shot introduces a character who appears to be in a hurry and is worried or anxious about something, setting a tense mood for the scene.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: A low, ominous electronic hum and the sound of footsteps.)
(00:03-00:05) A young man in a blue denim jacket walks through the same office space, holding a piece of paper. He has a focused and slightly tense expression as he moves through the room. (Storyline: Another character is introduced, also appearing focused and serious, suggesting they are both involved in a stressful situation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: N/A. 2) Background sounds or music: The ominous electronic score continues.)
